title: Device V2 backend launch acceptance small slices
purpose: Use these small backend slices instead of broad backend stories whenever d2-be blocks on prompt timeout or context size.
rules: One story must do exactly one backend phase.
Do not combine DB sample export, contract snapshot, Go tests, and backend fixes in one story.
If a command depends on real DB or external controller infrastructure and does not return promptly, write environment-blocked and stop.
Do not wait for long AI/model responses; write compact evidence and finish the runtime report.

stories.title: Backend Device V2 route and DTO snapshot only
stories.scope: Read backend route/model/DTO files and write a compact route/field snapshot for Device V2 list/detail/import/ingest/store evidence APIs.
stories.nonGoals: Do not query DB, do not run Go tests, do not edit code, and do not inspect frontend files.
acceptance: Includes only file references and field names needed by launch acceptance.

stories.title: Read-only Device V2 DB sample query only
stories.scope: Run only the approved read-only DB/API sample inspection for 5 real Device V2 candidates and write redacted candidate output.
stories.nonGoals: Do not run Go tests, do not edit code, do not write Excel, do not start collection, and do not resolve credential refs to secrets.
acceptance: Writes `sample-set-redacted.md` or updates `sample-set.json` with secret-free fields only.
Selects 5 candidates, preferably 1 per type, or records exclusions.
If DB/API access is unavailable, records environment-blocked and stops.

stories.title: Device V2 Go test gate only
stories.scope: Run only the approved Device V2 backend Go tests and write a compact test log summary.
stories.nonGoals: Do not query DB, do not inspect broad code, do not edit code unless a follow-up fix story is separately assigned.
acceptance: Writes pass/fail summary and log paths.
If failure is environment-driven, records environment-blocked and stops.

stories.title: One concrete Device V2 backend contract fix only
stories.scope: Fix exactly one confirmed Device V2 backend contract gap from prior evidence, then run the narrow relevant test.
stories.nonGoals: Do not do opportunistic refactors, migrations, production config changes, credential-system changes, or broad external integration work.
acceptance: Names the single contract gap being fixed.
Changes stay inside Device V2 backend paths.
Runs the narrow relevant Go test or records exact blocker.
